metaTitle: Password Generator — Free Strong Random Password Maker (100% Private)
metaDescription: Generate strong, random passwords instantly in your browser. Choose length, character types, and generate multiple passwords at once. 100% private — no data sent to servers.

howto.description: Use the slider to choose how long your password should be. 16+ characters is recommended for strong security.
Select which character types to include: uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols.
Passwords are generated instantly as you adjust settings. Click Regenerate anytime for new ones.
Tap any password to copy it to your clipboard instantly.

why: 100% private — passwords are generated entirely in your browser, never sent to any server
Cryptographically secure random generation using the Web Crypto API
Generate multiple passwords at once to find the one you like
Real-time strength indicator to ensure your password is strong enough
Works completely offline after the initial page load
No sign-up, no limits, completely free forever

faq.a: Yes. Passwords are generated using the Web Crypto API, which uses cryptographically secure randomness. They are never sent to any server.

faq.q: How long should my password be?
faq.a: We recommend at least 16 characters. The longer and more diverse the password, the harder it is to crack.

faq.q: Can I use this on my phone?
faq.a: Absolutely. The tool is fully optimized for mobile browsers including Safari on iOS and Chrome on Android.
A strong password is long (16+ characters), uses a mix of uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols, and avoids common words or personal information.

faq.q: Should I use the same password for multiple accounts?
faq.a: No. Always use a unique password for each account. If one is compromised, your other accounts stay safe.

faq.q: Where should I store my generated passwords?
faq.a: We recommend using a reputable password manager like Bitwarden or 1Password to store your passwords securely.
